overall.description: A cinematic walk through Night City in Cyberpunk 2077, beginning on a street corner with neon-lit buildings, proceeding through covered walkways and an enclosed underpass tunnel with holographic advertisements, and emerging onto a brightly lit street with towering corporate structures. The footage features a third-person perspective initially following a pedestrian before continuing through the cyberpunk urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city intersection with zebra crossing and neon signage

events.description: green sports car drives past on the right side of the frame
followed pedestrian turns to face camera briefly before camera continues forward

agents.ego_description: following a pedestrian with distinctive orange pants and white hair across a neon-lit intersection, then continuing straight as the pedestrian stops

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with orange pants and tank top walking ahead, then turning to face the camera at the crosswalk
green sports car driving along the street past the crosswalk

entered.detail: tall multi-story building with purple and cyan neon accent lighting
zebra crossing stripes on the red-tinted asphalt road surface
large industrial pole with yellow cross signage and traffic lights
large illuminated advertisement screen mounted on building roof

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a cyberpunk street corner at night, following a character with distinctive orange pants across a crosswalk. A green sports car passes by on the right as neon-lit buildings tower in the background. The camera maintains a steady third-person follow perspective as it crosses the intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with overhead structure and digital advertisements

events.description: entering covered walkway area with overhead roof structure blocking the sky
ambient light shifts to predominantly artificial sources from surrounding billboards

agents.ego_description: proceeding along the covered sidewalk past various street furniture and digital displays

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in blue shirt walking in the opposite direction along the sidewalk

entered.detail: overhead concrete and metal structure providing partial cover
large digital sign displaying B3 and other corporate messaging
brightly lit red cylindrical vending machine structure
rectangular planter box containing green bushes

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a covered pedestrian walkway with overhead structures blocking the night sky. The environment features digital billboards including a prominent B3 sign, a red vending kiosk, and planters with greenery. The lighting becomes more artificial and enclosed as the camera moves deeper into the urban corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed underpass tunnel with continuous cyan LED lighting and wall-mounted advertisements

events.description: entering fully enclosed tunnel section with cyan overhead strip lighting
slight curve to the right as the tunnel bends toward the exit

agents.ego_description: walking through the long enclosed tunnel with glowing advertisements on both sides, approaching the distant exit

notable_agents.action: distant pedestrian walking ahead in the tunnel toward the exit

entered.detail: continuous strip of bright cyan LED lights running the length of the tunnel ceiling
large monochrome advertisement displaying BATTLEFIELD CONTROL SYSTEMS text
large purple and white advertisement for Nicola brand covering the left wall
multi-lane road running parallel to the pedestrian walkway on the right side

segments.scene_description: The segment transitions into a fully enclosed underpass tunnel illuminated by continuous cyan LED strips overhead. Large advertisements including a Battlefield Control Systems billboard and Nicola brand wall cover the concrete surfaces. The camera moves steadily through the curved tunnel toward a distant light at the exit, with the road visible through barriers on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: open cyberpunk avenue with towering neon corporate buildings and elevated transit infrastructure

events.description: exiting the tunnel into open street with towering buildings and bright neon signage
vehicle passes by on the right side of the road

agents.ego_description: emerging from the tunnel onto a brightly lit street, continuing along the sidewalk past towering neon structures

notable_agents.action: car driving along the multi-lane road on the right

entered.detail: tall building facade covered in red neon lighting and corporate logos
overhead walkway or transit bridge connecting buildings across the street
building facade with multiple circular pink and red illuminated signs
wide asphalt road with multiple lanes and yellow dividing lines

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from the tunnel into a wide-open cyberpunk street dominated by a massive red neon-lit corporate tower on the right and circular holographic signs on the left. An elevated transit bridge spans overhead as vehicles pass on the multi-lane road. The environment shifts from the enclosed artificial lighting of the tunnel to the vibrant neon-lit open air of the downtown district.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dense urban corridor that transitions from a neon-lit street corner into an enclosed tunnel before emerging into a towering corporate district. It begins by following a character in orange pants across a night-time intersection as a green sports car speeds past beneath towering buildings. As the camera moves forward, the open sky is replaced by a covered pedestrian walkway filled with digital billboards, a red vending kiosk, and artificial lighting. The scene then shifts into a fully enclosed underpass tunnel illuminated by cyan LED strips and large corporate advertisements, moving steadily toward a distant light at the exit. Finally, the camera emerges from the tunnel into a wide-open downtown street dominated by a massive red neon corporate tower and circular holograms under an elevated transit bridge.
